selections.name: Tigerhon (fr)
selections.reason: Top class rating in the field (106) and consistently hits high speed figures in the mid-90s. Fits the turf sprint profile perfectly with strong late fractions.

selections.name: Central Dispatch
selections.reason: Possesses elite early speed and draws the outside post. If he can clear early without a duel, he is a massive threat to wire the field.

selections.name: Rexford
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of brilliance with a 94 speed figure recently. Should get a good stalking trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Special Club
selections.reason: Classy runner dropping in class slightly. Has back class to compete if the pace melts down.

danger_horse.name: Commander (fr)
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day, as seen two starts back.

selections.name: Romantic Ride
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (113) and comes off a strong 95 speed figure. Looks primed for a top effort.

selections.name: Courtside Action
selections.reason: Broke his maiden impressively last out with an 89 figure. Has upside and tactical speed.

selections.name: Southern Melodee
selections.reason: Consistent runner who figures to be in the mix late. Good outside draw for a stalking trip.

selections.name: Tommy Norris
selections.reason: Has early speed and a solid class rating. Can hold on for a piece of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Fumano's Magic
danger_horse.reason: Flashed an 81 speed figure recently; capable of hitting the board at a price.

selections.name: Aloha Dreamin
selections.reason: Very consistent form cycle with three straight figures around 80. Class of the field and draws the rail.

selections.name: Toulouse Detrac
selections.reason: Ran a huge 85 two starts back. If she replicates that effort, she is the main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Tom's Star
selections.reason: Steady improver who has been running in the mid-70s to low-80s. Fits well in this spot.

selections.name: Donttellourwives
selections.reason: Has the highest overall class rating (99) but needs to rebound from a poor last effort.

danger_horse.name: Moonlit Courage
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a mid-90s figure on her best day, making her a dangerous overlay.

selections.name: Gazon (gb)
selections.reason: Strong turf sprinter with a 95 last out. Fits the pace scenario perfectly and has back class.

selections.name: Gregory's Pride
selections.reason: Flashed a 96 last time and gets the rail. Will be saving ground and closing late.

selections.name: Travelin' Show
selections.reason: Consistent turf performer with figures in the 84-94 range. Outside draw keeps him out of trouble.

selections.name: Rhythem On Stage
selections.reason: Ran a 94 last out and has tactical speed to sit a good trip behind the leaders.

danger_horse.name: El Bromista
danger_horse.reason: Has back figures that make him a threat if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Christa Mcauliffe
selections.reason: Consistently runs in the 90s and has a strong class rating. Outside post is ideal for this distance.

selections.name: A Great Shaking
selections.reason: Solid form cycle with an 86 last out. Should be pressing the pace early.

selections.name: Memetic
selections.reason: Has back class and can pop a big figure. Rail draw means she must be used early.

selections.name: Dottie Hinson
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (118) but coming off a layoff. Dangerous if fully cranked.

danger_horse.name: Whopper Factor
danger_horse.reason: Showed a 79 last out but has a class rating of 114. Could surprise at a price.

selections.name: Gallatin
selections.reason: Ran a 91 last out and a 96 two back. Top class rating and handles the distance well.

selections.name: Allequin Summer
selections.reason: Very consistent with three straight 86+ figures. Will be closing hard late.

selections.name: Prime Artist (fr)
selections.reason: Has back figures of 89 and 98. Dangerous if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Dreamrider
selections.reason: Ran a 96 last out. If he repeats that effort, he is a major player.

danger_horse.name: Knowhere
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and an 84 figure two starts back. Can hit the board.

selections.name: Duke Silver
selections.reason: Experienced runner with figures of 91 and 84. Standout in a field with many first-time starters.

selections.name: Sir Davis
selections.reason: Ran an 80 on debut and has a massive 115 class rating. Expected to move forward significantly.

selections.name: Moon
selections.reason: Showed an 80 on debut with a 112 class rating. Outside draw is favorable for a young horse.

selections.name: Yautown
selections.reason: Ran an 81 on debut. Has experience and can improve second time out.

danger_horse.name: Peace On Earth
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter for Richard Mandella with Mike Smith up. Must respect the connections.

selections.name: City Exile (gb)
selections.reason: Elite turf form with figures of 108, 99, 107. Looks like a standout in this allowance field.

selections.name: Iron Man Cal
selections.reason: Consistently runs in the 90s and hit 100 last out. Major threat with Fresu aboard.

selections.name: Watsonville
selections.reason: Has figures of 97, 106, 101. Proven at this level and distance.

selections.name: Henry Adams (ire)
selections.reason: Classy European import with figures of 98, 105. Rail draw saves ground.

danger_horse.name: Centrodelantero
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent with figures of 98, 95, 105. Cannot be ignored in exotics.

selections.name: Big Notion
selections.reason: Consistent figures in the high 60s to low 70s. Class of a weak maiden claiming field.

selections.name: R Danny Boy
selections.reason: Ran a 70 and 68 recently. Has the speed to contend early.

selections.name: Farmer Tom
selections.reason: Flashed a 73 two starts back. Outside post keeps him out of trouble.

selections.name: Subic Boy
selections.reason: Consistent mid-50s figures. Can hit the board in a race lacking depth.

danger_horse.name: Rockabilly Rebal
danger_horse.reason: Ran a 63 on debut. Has room to improve second time out.

selections.name: Hardtobebetternow
selections.reason: Standout figures of 86, 81, 86. Highest class rating (111) and looks ready to graduate.

selections.name: Dr. Filkins
selections.reason: Ran an 81 last out and an 84 three back. Main danger to the favorite.

selections.name: Doing Time
selections.reason: Consistent runner with figures of 77, 81, 88. Will be closing late.

selections.name: Off The Bench
selections.reason: Has a 79 figure three back and gets the rail. Can save ground for a piece.

danger_horse.name: Island Paradise
danger_horse.reason: Consistent low-70s figures make him a logical underneath play in exotics.
